Component ApplicationMaster.description: TEST-LIVE-EDIT: As a developer working on Apache MapReduce, your task is to understand the design decisions behind the ApplicationMaster component. You want to study how the MapReduce ApplicationMaster coordinates jobs, tasks, and retries and understand the underlying architectural structure, tradeoffs, and implementation choices.

question1.description: What are the components and connectors of ApplicationMaster, and what rationale is given for those architectural choices?

question2.description: Which quality attributes are considered in the design of ApplicationMaster?

question3.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in ApplicationMaster to satisfy those quality attributes?

question4.description: Which technologies, libraries, or mechanisms are used in ApplicationMaster, and what rationale is given for selecting them?

Component InputFormat.description: As a developer working on Apache MapReduce, your task is to understand the design decisions behind the InputFormat component. You want to study how InputFormat and RecordReader partition data and expose records to tasks and understand the underlying architectural structure, tradeoffs, and implementation choices.

question1.description: What are the components and connectors of InputFormat, and what rationale is given for those architectural choices?

Requirement Output Security and Integrit.description: output integrity and safe publication are central requirements in Apache MapReduce. Your task is to explore the architectural decisions that Apache MapReduce uses to address Output Security and Integrity.

question2.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in Apache MapReduce to implement Output Security and Integrity?
